scripts.dev: concurrently -n main,notify,feedback,password,verify -c blue,green,magenta,cyan,yellow "npm --prefix main-app run dev" "npm --prefix notification-service run dev" "npm --prefix feedback-service run dev" "npm --prefix Password-Generator-Microservice run dev" "npm --prefix Verification-Microservice run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently -n main,notify,feedback,password,verify -c blue,green,magenta,cyan,yellow "npm --prefix main-app start" "npm --prefix notification-service start" "npm --prefix feedback-service start" "npm --prefix Password-Generator-Microservice start" "npm --prefix Verification-Microservice start"
